mingghan_allocations.title: Identify and Retrieve Meeting Notes
mingghan_allocations.description: Locate and retrieve the meeting notes for February 23, 2026, using available tools (notes_list, notes_get).

mingghan_allocations.title: Initial Content Screening
mingghan_allocations.description: Perform an initial review of the retrieved meeting notes to understand the overall content and structure.

mingghan_allocations.title: Extract Key Decisions
mingghan_allocations.description: Identify and extract all key decisions made during the meeting from the notes.

mingghan_allocations.title: Extract Key Action Items
mingghan_allocations.description: Identify and extract all action items assigned during the meeting from the notes.

mingghan_allocations.title: Extract Key Discussion Points
mingghan_allocations.description: Identify and extract the main discussion topics and outcomes from the notes.

mingghan_allocations.title: Draft Summary - Initial Version
mingghan_allocations.description: Compile the extracted key decisions, action items, and discussion points into an initial draft of the meeting summary.

mingghan_allocations.title: Review and Refine Summary
mingghan_allocations.description: Review the initial summary draft for clarity, conciseness, and accuracy, making necessary refinements.

mingghan_allocations.title: Confirm Attendee List
mingghan_allocations.description: Verify and confirm the list of all attendees who should receive the meeting summary.

mingghan_allocations.title: Prepare Sharing Mechanism
mingghan_allocations.description: Prepare the notes_share tool with the correct note_id and recipients for distribution.

mingghan_allocations.title: Execute Meeting Notes Sharing
mingghan_allocations.description: Execute the sharing of the finalized meeting summary to all confirmed attendees and confirm delivery.
